markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.181 — Issuance of Driver’s License

On payment of the required fee, the department shall issue to each qualifying applicant a driver’s license of the class for which the applicant has applied.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: On payment of the required fee, the department shall issue to each qualifying applicant a driver’s license of the class for which the applicant has applied.
